Other: 1230: At 12:30 received the news of the fall of Richmond, dressed ship with the American Ensign at the fore, mizzen and Gaff. Union Jack forward.
8AM: At 8 A.M. dressed ship in honor of Lee's surrender to Gen'l Grant.

Note: 0600: Passed Boston Lt to Nd. 0630 Boston Lt brg WxN; Minot Lt brg SExS.
1015: Cape Cod brg SSE dist abt 30 mi.
1125: Cape Cod lt brg SxW dist 20 mi.
1140: Got Underway. Steamed out of Orto Roads. (?)
1540: SE point of Pico brg NNE, dist 12 mi.
1600: San Jorge brg NExE1/2E; Pico brg NNE.
Noon: First part of watch standing in for the mouth of the Tagus River.
1030: Left the pilot outside the bar.
1900: Cape St. Vincent Lt brg SE1/2E.
2200: Cape St Vincent Lt brg NWxN.
Noon: Noon to 4 steaming thru Sraits of Gibraltar. Noon: Cadiz, Spain.
1950 Tarif LH brg N, dist 11/2 mi.
1535: Cape St Vincent Lt brg NxW.
1640: Cape St Vincent LT brg NxW.
0630: Cabo Espichel brg E, dist 8 mi.
1720: Faro de Cabo Tourinan in sight.
0400: Seine Lt brg SExE.  Cc NNE.
1315: Got Underway. Standing thru Le Chanal du Tour.
1600: Ushant Lt brg NWxW, Kermovan Lt S1/2E.
1350: South Foreland Lt brg N1/2W. 1315: cc E.
0730: Got Underway. Standing in for Flushing.
1825: West Hinder LS brg N. 1800 cc W. 1830 cc WxS.
2130: Dunkirk Lt brg Sxe; 2135 Calais Lt 2 pts on port bow.
0345: Dungeness Lt brg N dist 3 mi.
0600: Beachy Head on stbd bow, dist 15 mi.
8AM: Beachy Head Lt brg NxW dist 10 mi.
2200: cc W. 2255 Casquet Lt brg SSW.
1030: Isle be Bas (Isle de Batz ?) Lt brg SxE1/2E.
1125: St Mathieu Lt brg NNE3/4E; Kermorvan Kt brg NxE3/4E. Pointe de Penharn (?) brg SE.

Other: 2000: Observed a number of meteors during the watch.
0830: At 8:30 discovered the starboard coal bunkers to be on fire. Commence to pump water into them and to remove the coal. At 11 the fire reported out.

Note: 8AM: Northern Lt on Ushant brg SExS1/2S; southern Lt S1/4E.
1710: Banling Lt brg SE1/4E, Taaral House E1/2S.  (Farol da Berlenga)
0915: Got Underway. Shifted anchorage. Anchjred at 1000.
Noon: Got Underway Noon: Lisbon, Portugal.
1605: Cape Epichel Lt brg ESE, dist 10 mi. (Farol do Cabo Espichel)
0608: Cape St Vincent Lt brg E, cc SE1/4E.
0410: Cape Trafalgar Lt 1 pt on stbd bow. cc ESE1/2E. 0430 cc E1/2S.
0640: Cape Trafalgar Lt brg NxE, dist 2 mi.
0923: Tarifa LH brg NNE. 0930: cc E3/4S.
1025: Europa Pt brg NNE, Almina Pt S3/4E. (Faro de Ceuta)
0300: Cape De Gata brg NExN1/2N, cc Exn3/4N.
